item.title: FANUC America Ultra Lightweight CRX-3iA Collaborative Robot
item.description: FANUC America has expanded its popular CRX collaborative robot series with the introduction of the CRX-3iA , an ultra lightweight cobot designed for fast redeployment across small, high mix tasks.

item.title: Aeva and Nikon Bring High-Precision Sensing to Automated Metrology
item.description: The Nikon APDIS MV5X Laser Radar represents the next generation of high-precision, non-contact measurement systems.

item.title: Deva Electronic Controls Announces Native CNC Integration with PolyWorks|Inspector
item.description: The integration combines Deva’s high-performance CMM control with PolyWorks|Inspector, InnovMetric’s universal metrology software platform.

item.title: InnovMetric PolyWorks 2026
item.description: InnovMetric announced the launch of PolyWorks® 2026.

item.title: PolyWorks 2026 Launch Elevates 3D Measurement with Cloud Technology, AI, and Universal Compatibility
item.description: InnovMetric, the independent software development company that empowers manufacturers of every size to digitally transform their 3D measurement processes, has launched PolyWorks 2026.

item.title: High-Precision 3D Measurement in a New Ultra-Compact Form
item.description: The scanCONTROL 8500 laser scanners from Micro-Epsilon redefine industrial 3D measurement technology.

item.title: Pleora and imavix Partner to Advance GigE Vision 3.0 with High-Speed, Deterministic Ethernet Solution
item.description: Collaboration introduces an integrated solution combining FPGA-based GigE Vision 3.0 IP cores with Pleora’s SDK,
